templates.name: Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1
templates.purpose: Canonical page-level Dashboard template for new Yeeflow Dashboard pages. Copy and normalize the export-shaped page shell, then select/remove/adapt sections from business requirements.
templates.relationshipToGoldenReferences: This page shell coexists with the Event Portfolio component Golden Reference. Event Portfolio header/filter/KPI/grid-table regions may be mapped into section_content_area regions without breaking the v1.1 page skeleton.

sectionSelectionRules.oneColumn: Use for wide, dense, tabular, or long-label content such as Collection grid/table sections.
sectionSelectionRules.twoOrThreeColumn: Use for short comparable cards with similar density and height.
sectionSelectionRules.sixtyForty: Use when one side is primary and the other is supporting context, summary, notes, actions, or status.
sectionSelectionRules.operations: Include Operations containers only when real configured actions exist; omit otherwise.

forbiddenGeneratedDashboardPatterns: dashboard-only upgrade mutation of non-dashboard resources

widthCompletion.rule: All template container nodes with missing attrs.style.widthtype are completed as Full width [null, "1"].

controlledSlotRules: Business text, bindings, filters, KPI values, FontAwesome icons, actions, and Collection/table fields may only change inside allowed business-content containers.
New dashboard layout modules may only be added by copying one of the allowed repeatable/removable modules.
Copied modules must preserve template structure, hierarchy, control types, width, padding, direction, gap, background, and required children.
Non-business template containers must remain structurally equivalent to the v1.1 template.
Operations containers must be omitted when no real actions exist.
Additional KPI cards must copy event_portfolio_kpi_planned_events and replace only allowed KPI business content.
